title: RIA API Reference
goal: Align Hussh Research RIA facade work with the CRD scraping and financial-verification provider contract.
required_commands: cd consent-protocol && PYTEST_DISABLE_PLUGIN_AUTOLOAD=1 uv run pytest --noconftest tests/test_crd_scraper_routes.py -q

commands: cd consent-protocol && PYTEST_DISABLE_PLUGIN_AUTOLOAD=1 uv run pytest --noconftest tests/test_crd_scraper_routes.py -q
tests: cd consent-protocol && PYTEST_DISABLE_PLUGIN_AUTOLOAD=1 uv run pytest --noconftest tests/test_crd_scraper_routes.py -q

common_failures: building scraper logic inside Hussh Research instead of forwarding to the provider
treating stale local provider docs as repo truth
changing facade payloads without updating tests
